title: Present Pursuit
subtitle: A pocket-sized trail of playful clues, with Bubbles trotting beside you.

intro.headline: A present waits at trail's end
body: Keep this phone close by your side while you wander, peek, and roam.
Each clue will point toward a real-world spot, and each tucked-away QR will open the next verse in the trail.
Bubbles is here for moral support, sparkle supervision, and triumphant little ta-das.

finish.headline: The final verse has led you here
body: Here is where the real reveal, surprise note, or final flourish should appear.
Swap in your proper ending once the clues are ready, and let the unicorn bask in the glory.

steps.title: Clue One
steps.body: Where paper wishes like to stay, your first small clue may hide away.
steps.hint: Think of a place that already holds little paper memories or messages.

steps.title: Clue Two
steps.body: Where little treats are tucked from view, there waits a brighter hint for you.
steps.caption: A cheerful placeholder image. Swap this for a photo or clue image later.
steps.hint: Somewhere snacks go to wait patiently.

steps.title: Clue Three
steps.body: A tune, a note, a moving clue, may hum the next stop just for you.
steps.caption: Replace the embed URL with your own clue video.
steps.hint: Follow the vibe of the clip to the next hiding place.

steps.title: Final Clue
steps.body: The final sign is tucked quite near the gift or note that waits right here.
steps.hint: Hide the last code somewhere delightfully obvious once she has earned it.
